claimText: The Davis Strait connects the Labrador Sea and Baffin Bay.
evidenceExcerpt: Davis Strait connects the Labrador Sea and Baffin Bay.
examUse: Map-based correct-pair or statement-based question on straits and connected water bodies.
distractorHooks: Connects Bering Sea and Chukchi Sea
Connects Hudson Bay and Atlantic Ocean

claimText: The Kamchatka Peninsula is located in the Russian Far East on the Pacific Ring of Fire and is surrounded by the Bering Sea, Pacific Ocean, and Sea of Okhotsk.
evidenceExcerpt: Kamchatka Peninsula is located in the Russian Far East on the Pacific Ring of Fire, surrounded by the Bering Sea, Pacific Ocean, and Sea of Okhotsk.
examUse: Map-based question identifying the surrounding water bodies of the Kamchatka Peninsula.
distractorHooks: Surrounded by the Sea of Japan and Yellow Sea

claimText: The Perito Moreno glacier, also known as the 'White Giant', is located in Los Glaciares National Park in Argentina.
evidenceExcerpt: Perito Moreno glacier, known as the 'White Giant', is located in Argentina's Los Glaciares National Park.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching glaciers to their respective countries or national parks.
distractorHooks: Located in Chile's Torres del Paine

claimText: The Drake Passage lies between Cape Horn and the South Shetland Islands and forms part of the Antarctic Circumpolar Current.
evidenceExcerpt: Drake Passage lies between Cape Horn and the South Shetland Islands, forming part of the Antarctic Circumpolar Current.
examUse: Statement-based question on the location and oceanographic significance of the Drake Passage.
distractorHooks: Lies between the Falkland Islands and Argentina
Forms part of the Gulf Stream

claimText: Scarborough Shoal, also known as Huangyan Island or Panatag Shoal, is a small atoll located in the South China Sea.
evidenceExcerpt: Scarborough Shoal (Huangyan Island/Panatag Shoal) is a small atoll in the South China Sea.
examUse: Map-based or correct-pair question matching disputed islands/shoals to their respective seas.
distractorHooks: Located in the East China Sea
Located in the Sea of Japan
